raw: Type of pass: E-code, emailed upon reservation. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 2 adults at $15 per person and 4 youths aged 7-17 at $10 per person (general admission and special exhibition). Children under 7 are admitted free. Additional instructions: - Pre-registration is recommended. Visit the Museum of Fine Arts website and use the e-code discount to reserve. -To access your e-code, click "Access Pass" in your confirmation email. The e-code is found under the barcode.
